name: Favorite Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 package Carrol Shelby Texas brand chili mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain.
2. Add onions, pepper, and garlic; cook until vegetables are tender.
3. Add tomato sauce and 1 cup beer to the pot.
4. Add large spice packet, salt, and cayenne pepper to taste; stir well.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
6. Simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Gradually add remaining beer to the chili mix packet, stirring until well blended.
8. Stir the combined mixture into the meat mixture and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Serve with shredded sharp cheddar cheese on top.
